enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual vlog from Boulder on February 17, 2016, reflecting on his time away from YouTube and modern news. He discusses immersing himself in historical/past voices through audio content and shares his excitement about recently starting to follow news again via text-to-speech on his computer.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: deliberately avoided modern news to focus on historical perspectives and past thinkers
excited to return to making video logs after a long break
newly enthusiastic about having the computer read news articles aloud
